column8: The model does not generate the prediction on the best model because of a copy-pasting mistake done before submitting the git repo and this saves the overfitted epochs at the end not the most learned epoch- generates the prediction . This is why the model generates high accuracy although it has learned the real validations correctly but not overfitted to the dataset . We don't wish to change the code for this mistake as it would be against the spirit of the hackathon. However this is the reason the final accuracy generated is not the exact representation but an approximation and the real model which does show about 84 to 85 percent accuracy.
